title: Quintet
blurb: Press the board to place 5-cell blocks on a 10×10 grid and fill rows and columns to clear them for score.
description: A deterministic block-breaking placement game on the engine. Press the board to summon the generated quintet (a 5-cell polyomino) under your cursor — or drag it from the side panel — and release to place it on the 10×10 board; fill any whole row or column to clear it, and clear several lines at once for bonus points. Every offered piece is a real orthogonally-connected pentomino guaranteed to fit somewhere — generation is seeded from the board, score, and move count, so a given state always yields the same next piece. When nothing fits, the board reports a stuck state and you press Reset.
